title: Operators
subtitle: CMS admin / operator / viewer accounts. Unlock, register, change role.

create_modal.title: Register new admin
create_modal.handover_notice: After registration, deliver the password to the new user via a secure channel. The system does not send it automatically.

role_change_modal.title: Change role
role_change_modal.demotion_warning: Cannot change role from admin if only one admin remains.

password_shown.title: Admin registered
password_shown.warning: This password is shown only once. Deliver it to the user via a secure channel.

errors.last_admin_demotion: Cannot demote the last admin account.
errors.weak_password: Password does not meet policy (8+ chars, no common patterns).
